description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves and branding in graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsVintage styling on this classic T-shirt is a sure-fire way of upping your style statement. This tee from locomotive is crafted from a soft cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort which, along with its fashionable styling, makes this a great addition to your wardrobe. Pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
